notes: Fixed a bug with the tag file that affected deck generation from 4/6/26 - 4/8/26
Updated other parts of the app to respect scryfall's new cooldown policy
Optimizer now shows price difference for each swap
Deck optimizer values fetchlands less now
Clickable version label with patch notes (thats this!)
Fixed ban lists not applying during deck generation
Tempo slider for controlling deck pacing
Smarter deck generation with better role balancing
Export button now visible on mobile
Deck analyzer with land and curve grading
Revamped deck toolbar and editing workflow
Context menus and combo detail previews
